case_title: FOREMAN LINDA E et al VS ODON LOUIS IND/DBA A.S.A.P EXPEDITE

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ODON LOUIS IND/DBA A.S.A.P EXPEDITE

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $985.00 FILED BY FOREMAN LINDA E HARRIS PAT HERNANDEZ CHRISTINE DYKSTRA TOD MANION YOLANDA ROSE THOMAS SNEED SARAH AS TO DEFENDANT ODON LOUIS IND/DBA A.S.A.P EXPEDITE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-10-1994 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FOREMAN LINDA E HARRIS PAT MANION YOLANDA ROSE THOMAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ODON LOUIS IND/DBA A.S.A.P EXPEDITE $540.00 PRINCIPAL, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $576.00, $125 FOR LINDA B. FOREMAN; $145 FOR YOLANDA MANION $125 FOR PATRICIA HARRIS AND $145 FOR THOMAS ROSE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
